features: Air Wick Active Fresh Automatic Spray Diffuser Unit + Spring Woodland Escape Refill 228ml
Air Wick's 1st Aerosol-Free & Best Ever Automatic Spray Refill with 95% naturally based ingredients
Inspired by a combination of fresh florals, green notes with woodsy aromas of sandalwood to create a natural and refreshing scent
Aerosol free, free from propellant and dyes and Infused with natural oils, it neutralises Pet, Kitchen and Bathroom odours
Each refill lasts up to 70 days* and has 3 settings to find your preferred fragrance level
Recyclable Refill Bottle, made from 50% PCR
Contains 1 diffuser, 1 refill and 2 AA batteries
